# Getting Help

## Documentation

Full Chat SDK documentation, guides, and API reference: [chat-sdk.dev/docs](https://chat-sdk.dev/docs).

## Bugs and feature requests

Open an [issue](https://github.com/vercel/chat/issues/new/choose) using the appropriate template.

## Security vulnerabilities

Do not file a public issue. See [SECURITY.md](./SECURITY.md) — email `security@vercel.com` or use [GitHub's private advisory form](https://github.com/vercel/chat/security/advisories/new).
